framework_name: NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 — Protecting CUI in Nonfederal Systems

controls.title: Limit system access to authorized users
controls.description: Limit system access to authorized users

controls.title: Limit system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute

controls.description: Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs

controls.description: Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after a period of inactivity

controls.description: Terminate user sessions after a defined condition

controls.description: Monitor and control remote access sessions

controls.description: Authorize remote execution of privileged commands and remote access to security-relevant information

controls.description: Authorize wireless access prior to allowing such connections

controls.description: Control connection of mobile devices

controls.description: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices and mobile computing platforms

controls.description: Verify and control/limit connections to and use of external systems

controls.description: Limit use of organizational portable storage devices on external systems

controls.description: Control CUI posted or processed on publicly accessible systems

controls.title: Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities and of applicable policies, standards, and procedures
controls.description: Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities and of applicable policies, standards, and procedures

controls.title: Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities
controls.description: Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities

controls.title: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat
controls.description: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat

controls.title: Create and retain system audit logs and records to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity
controls.description: Create and retain system audit logs and records to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity

controls.title: Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced so they can be held accountable for their actions
controls.description: Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced so they can be held accountable for their actions

controls.title: Review and update logged events
controls.description: Review and update logged events

controls.title: Alert in the event of an audit logging process failure
controls.description: Alert in the event of an audit logging process failure

controls.title: Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity
controls.description: Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity

controls.title: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting
controls.description: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting

controls.title: Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks with an authoritative source to generate time stamps for audit records
controls.description: Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks with an authoritative source to generate time stamps for audit records

controls.title: Protect audit information and audit logging tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion
controls.description: Protect audit information and audit logging tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion

controls.title: Limit management of audit logging functionality to a subset of privileged users
controls.description: Limit management of audit logging functionality to a subset of privileged users

controls.title: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems (including hardware, software, firmware, and documentation) throughout the respective system development life cycles
controls.description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems (including hardware, software, firmware, and documentation) throughout the respective system development life cycles

controls.title: Establish and enforce security configuration settings for IT products employed in organizational systems
controls.description: Establish and enforce security configuration settings for IT products employed in organizational systems

controls.title: Track, review, approve or disapprove, and log changes to organizational systems
controls.description: Track, review, approve or disapprove, and log changes to organizational systems

controls.title: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation
controls.description: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation

controls.title: Define, document, approve, and enforce physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes to organizational systems
controls.description: Define, document, approve, and enforce physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes to organizational systems

controls.title: Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring organizational systems to provide only essential capabilities
controls.description: Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring organizational systems to provide only essential capabilities

controls.title: Restrict, disable, or prevent the use of nonessential programs, functions, ports, protocols, and services
controls.description: Restrict, disable, or prevent the use of nonessential programs, functions, ports, protocols, and services

controls.title: Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software
controls.description: Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software

controls.title: Control and monitor user-installed software
controls.description: Control and monitor user-installed software

controls.title: Identify system users, processes acting on behalf of users, and devices
controls.description: Identify system users, processes acting on behalf of users, and devices

controls.title: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of users, processes, or devices as a prerequisite to allowing access to organizational systems
controls.description: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of users, processes, or devices as a prerequisite to allowing access to organizational systems

controls.title: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts
controls.description: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts

controls.title: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts
controls.description: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts

controls.title: Prevent reuse of identifiers for a defined period
controls.description: Prevent reuse of identifiers for a defined period

controls.title: Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity
controls.description: Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity

controls.title: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created
controls.description: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created

controls.title: Prohibit password reuse for a specified number of generations
controls.description: Prohibit password reuse for a specified number of generations

controls.title: Allow temporary password use for system logons with an immediate change to a permanent password
controls.description: Allow temporary password use for system logons with an immediate change to a permanent password

controls.title: Store and transmit only cryptographically-protected passwords
controls.description: Store and transmit only cryptographically-protected passwords

controls.title: Obscure feedback of authentication information
controls.description: Obscure feedback of authentication information

controls.title: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational systems that includes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities
controls.description: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational systems that includes preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities

controls.title: Track, document, and report incidents to designated officials and/or authorities both internal and external to the organization
controls.description: Track, document, and report incidents to designated officials and/or authorities both internal and external to the organization

controls.title: Test the organizational incident response capability
controls.description: Test the organizational incident response capability

controls.title: Perform maintenance on organizational systems
controls.description: Perform maintenance on organizational systems

controls.title: Provide controls on the tools, techniques, mechanisms, and personnel used to conduct system maintenance
controls.description: Provide controls on the tools, techniques, mechanisms, and personnel used to conduct system maintenance

controls.title: Ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI
controls.description: Ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI

controls.title: Check media containing diagnostic and test programs for malicious code before the media are used in organizational systems
controls.description: Check media containing diagnostic and test programs for malicious code before the media are used in organizational systems

controls.title: Require multifactor authentication to establish nonlocal maintenance sessions via external network connections and terminate such connections when nonlocal maintenance is complete
controls.description: Require multifactor authentication to establish nonlocal maintenance sessions via external network connections and terminate such connections when nonlocal maintenance is complete

controls.title: Supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization
controls.description: Supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization

controls.title: Protect (i.e., physically control and securely store) system media containing CUI, both paper and digital
controls.description: Protect (i.e., physically control and securely store) system media containing CUI, both paper and digital

controls.title: Limit access to CUI on system media to authorized users
controls.description: Limit access to CUI on system media to authorized users

controls.title: Sanitize or destroy system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse
controls.description: Sanitize or destroy system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse

controls.title: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations
controls.description: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations

controls.title: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport outside of controlled areas
controls.description: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport outside of controlled areas

controls.title: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of CUI stored on digital media during transport unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of CUI stored on digital media during transport unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards

controls.title: Control the use of removable media on system components
controls.description: Control the use of removable media on system components

controls.title: Prohibit the use of portable storage devices when such devices have no identifiable owner
controls.description: Prohibit the use of portable storage devices when such devices have no identifiable owner

controls.title: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations

controls.title: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to organizational systems containing CUI
controls.description: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to organizational systems containing CUI

controls.title: Ensure that organizational systems containing CUI are protected during and after personnel actions such as terminations and transfers
controls.description: Ensure that organizational systems containing CUI are protected during and after personnel actions such as terminations and transfers

controls.title: Limit physical access to organizational systems, equipment, and the respective operating environments to authorized individuals
controls.description: Limit physical access to organizational systems, equipment, and the respective operating environments to authorized individuals

controls.title: Protect and monitor the physical facility and support infrastructure for organizational systems
controls.description: Protect and monitor the physical facility and support infrastructure for organizational systems

controls.title: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity
controls.description: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity

controls.title: Maintain audit logs of physical access
controls.description: Maintain audit logs of physical access

controls.title: Control and manage physical access devices
controls.description: Control and manage physical access devices

controls.title: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites
controls.description: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites

controls.title: Periodically assess the risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals, resulting from the operation of organizational systems and the associated processing, storage, or transmission of CUI
controls.description: Periodically assess the risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals, resulting from the operation of organizational systems and the associated processing, storage, or transmission of CUI

controls.title: Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities affecting those systems and applications are identified
controls.description: Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities affecting those systems and applications are identified

controls.title: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments
controls.description: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments

controls.title: Periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application
controls.description: Periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application

controls.title: Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational systems
controls.description: Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational systems

controls.title: Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls
controls.description: Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls

controls.title: Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems
controls.description: Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems

controls.title: Monitor, control, and protect communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of organizational systems
controls.description: Monitor, control, and protect communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of organizational systems

controls.title: Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems
controls.description: Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems

controls.title: Separate user functionality from system management functionality
controls.description: Separate user functionality from system management functionality

controls.title: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources
controls.description: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources

controls.title: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks
controls.description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks

controls.title: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception
controls.description: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception

controls.title: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling)
controls.description: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling)

controls.title: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards

controls.title: Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity
controls.description: Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity

controls.title: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational systems
controls.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational systems

controls.title: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI
controls.description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI

controls.title: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device
controls.description: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device

controls.title: Control and monitor the use of mobile code
controls.description: Control and monitor the use of mobile code

controls.title: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies
controls.description: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies

controls.title: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions
controls.description: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions

controls.title: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest

controls.title: Identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner

controls.title: Provide protection from malicious code at designated locations within organizational systems
controls.description: Provide protection from malicious code at designated locations within organizational systems

controls.title: Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response
controls.description: Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response

controls.title: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available
controls.description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available

controls.title: Perform periodic scans of organizational systems and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed
controls.description: Perform periodic scans of organizational systems and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed

controls.title: Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks
controls.description: Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks

controls.title: Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems
controls.description: Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems
